name: reviewer-team-backend
description: Parallel expert reviewers for backend/server code: security, performance, types, data-integrity. No a11y axis. Orchestrator merges findings.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews a diff for backend security: SQL injection, command injection, SSRF, auth/session bugs, secret leakage, insecure deserialization.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging concrete server-side security risks with file:line citations and OWASP/CWE references. Out of scope: client-side XSS, frontend a11y, style.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews a diff for server-side perf: N+1 queries, missing indexes, unbounded result sets, blocking IO in hot paths, unnecessary allocations, cache miss patterns.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging server perf anti-patterns with measurement suggestions (EXPLAIN, profilers, load test). Out of scope: client render perf, security.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews static types and contracts: any leakage, unsound assertions, schema/DB type drift, request/response payload mismatches.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging type-safety regressions and contract drift with suggested corrections. Out of scope: runtime behavior, performance.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Reviews persistence and data flow for integrity risks: missing transactions, race conditions, weak constraints, idempotency gaps, migration safety, data loss vectors.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for flagging concrete data integrity risks with reproduction scenarios and remediation. Out of scope: presentation, a11y.

replace.TODO: Describe in 2-4 sentences.\n (1): Use on PR review for backend/server changes (API handlers, services, DB migrations, infra). Runs security, perf, types, and data-integrity reviewers in parallel and merges findings. Do NOT trigger for frontend-only diffs (use expert-review-pool for that) or docs-only changes.
